subcodes.first_line: O thou who art ardently supplicating unto God! While the world-illumining Sun doth gaze upon the West, this servant's eyes are fixed upon the East [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده مبتهل الی الله --- و آفتاب جهان افروز متوجه غرب و این عبد ناظر بشرق
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @East and West; communication between East and West, @spiritual transformation, @praise of Western values; culture, @Manifestation of God as sun
